architecture_plan.title: AlphaEvolve: A Coding Agent for Scientific and Algorithmic Discovery - Demo Implementation
architecture_plan.overview: A modular implementation architecture for demonstrating AlphaEvolve, a coding agent that discovers scientific and algorithmic solutions through evolutionary programming. The system implements core components including task specification, prompt sampling, creative generation, evaluation, and evolution mechanisms using JAX/Flax for efficient computation.

modules.purpose: Defines the problem space and constraints for scientific discovery tasks, including mathematical problems and algorithmic challenges
Generates diverse prompts for creative code generation using various sampling strategies and heuristics
Implements the core evolutionary algorithm that generates, mutates, and evolves code solutions
Evaluates generated code solutions against scientific benchmarks and mathematical correctness criteria
Coordinates the end-to-end evolutionary process including selection, crossover, mutation, and fitness evaluation
Implements ResNet-based neural network models for image classification tasks as demonstrated in the paper
Manages optimization configurations including AdamW with weight decay regularization
Performs automated hyperparameter tuning using zipit for efficient exploration of parameter space

framework_suggestions: JAX/Flax for numerical computing and neural network implementation
Haiku (JAX library) for module-based neural network construction
Optax for optimizer configuration and training utilities
TensorFlow Datasets or similar for data loading
